== Notes for [[Item:Q57636|Q57636]] ==

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADB9F6A21EFBBFA9822EF79916C4E96
geni:6000000076399600913

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
